zh.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix是gobert de corbion和marguerite de saint aubin的女兒，於大約1330年出生在法國。她和Guillebert I de  Lannoy至少有8個兒子。她去世於1433年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易享年104歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix是gobert de corbion和marguerite de saint aubin的女儿，于大约1330年出生在法国。她和Guillebert I de  Lannoy至少有8个儿子。她去世于1433年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德利勒-藍諾易享年104岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corbon,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French, Irish or Scottish   Caron   or of its variant or altered form   Carron  , and possibly also of some other similar (like-sounding) surname, such as Irish and Manx   Corrin  . Compare   Coron   1 and   Corro   3.
In some cases probably also French: variant of   Coron   2 ‘corner’.

variants.name: Caron
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Normand, Marcel, Andre, Lucien, Pierre, Fernand, Emile, Gaston, Laurent, Adrien, Alcide.

French and Walloon; Flemish and Dutch (of French origin): metonymic occupational name for a carter, or possibly a cartwright, from caron, a Norman-Picard form of Old French charron ‘carter’ or ‘cartwright’.

French: from a personal name of Gaulish origin, represented in Latin records in the form Caraunus. This name was borne by a 5th-century Breton saint who lived at Chartres and was murdered by robbers; his legend led to its widespread use as a personal name during the Middle Ages. Compare Carron , Carrow 2, Coron 1, and Corrow .

nameMeanings.name: dame
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: from Middle English, Old French dame ‘lady’ (from Latin domina ‘mistress’), applied as a nickname for a foppish young man whose outfit and manner have an effeminate elegance, or as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a lady. As a French name it may also be a nickname meaning ‘mother-in-law’.
English: possibly an East Anglian variant of   Dam   4.

variants.name: Dam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Hoa, Tuan, Ngoc, Thanh, Binh, Chanh, Duc, Hiep, Minh, Nu, Tien.  Southeast Asian Hong, Chan, Dong, Hon, Man, Oi, Ok, Phoung, Sang, Sokhom, Sun.
Vietnamese (Đàm): from the Chinese surnames 譚, 谈 and 覃, see Tan 1-3.
Cambodian: written ដាំ, possibly of Vietnamese origin (see above). The surname ដាំ also corresponds to the Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘to plant’.

meanings: Variant spelling of   Katherine .  This form of the name is also used in France.

en.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix was born about 1330, in France as the daughter of gobert de corbion and marguerite de saint aubin. She had at least 8 sons with Guillebert I de  Lannoy. She died in 1433, in Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 104.

fr.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix est née environ 1330, à France, fille de gobert de corbion et marguerite de saint aubin. Elle a eu au moins 8 fils avec Guillebert I de  Lannoy. Elle est décédée en 1433, à Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 104 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix wurde um 1330 in Frankreich, als Tochter von gobert de corbion und marguerite de saint aubin geboren. Sie hatte mit Guillebert I de  Lannoy mindestens 8 Söhne. Sie starb 1433 im Alter von 104 Jahren in Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix è nata il circa 1330 nel Francia come figlia di gobert de corbion e marguerite de saint aubin. Lei avuto almeno 8 figli con Guillebert I de  Lannoy. Morì nel 1433, nel Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 104 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaixは約1330年にフランスでgobert de corbionとmarguerite de saint aubinの娘として生まれた。彼女はGuillebert I de  Lannoyとの間に少なくとも8人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1433年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードリス-レズ-ラノイで104歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix(은)는 대략 1330년 프랑스에서 gobert de corbion(와)과 marguerite de saint aubin의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Guillebert I de  Lannoy(와)과 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1433년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 리스-레즈-랜이에서 104세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em França filha de gobert de corbion e marguerite de saint aubin. Ela teve pelo menos 8 filhos com Guillebert I de  Lannoy. Ela faleceu em 1433, em Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 104 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix родилась около 1330 г. в местности Франция. Её родителей звали gobert de corbion и marguerite de saint aubin. У неё было по крайней мере 8 сыновей от Guillebert I de  Lannoy. Она умерла в 1433 г. в местности лис-лез-ланнои, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 104 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Catherine de Corbon, dame de Molembaix nació aproximadamente 1330, en Francia como hija de gobert de corbion y marguerite de saint aubin. Tuvo por lo menos 8 hijos con Guillebert I de  Lannoy. Murió en 1433, en Lys-lez-Lannoy, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 104 años.
